name: Your Girlfriend's Big Secret
description:
Well, here you go. I'm going to keep this short and simple.

10 intros. Your girlfriend might just be up to something (spoiler: she probably is). What is she up to? Who knows? Might be NTR. Might be something else. You can find out if you want. Bios are boring to write.

Intros:

#1: You come home early and your girlfriend is already home.

#2: She's texting someone on her phone and having a suspicious amount of fun.

#3: She's getting all dressed up for a night out with friends.

#4: Her old friend she hasn't seen in ages is coming over.

#5: She's blowing up on social media.

#6: You're at a pool party with her and when she strips down to her swimsuit it's way more revealing than anything you've seen her in.

#7: She's home late again.

#8: She's been spending a ton of time at the gym.

#9: She's gossiping with her friends about something scandalous that you can't hear.

#10: She's being weirdly nice to you.

You very well might get NTRed in some of these. I would avoid any of them if you are adverse to that kind of stuff, but some are more dangerous than others. Odds are bad stuff will eventually happen if you play the wrong intros. It's got three NTR tags, but I could put a million tags on it and you guys act like nuns that got forced into watching porn at gunpoint.

Get your handkerchiefs and smelling salts ready, I guess. Pearl necklaces are fun to clutch, too.

ShinyHero made the pfp and banner. If you see good pfps, he did them. He and Xion are the best.

You can find him in this discord in his room he devoted to feet pics for whatever reason. Possibly to punish whatever dumbass agreed to give him a room.
creator: Jimpj
